---
title: "Presentation"
format: revealjs
---

```{r}
#| file: draft-results-code.R
#| include: false
```

# Intro
# Water Temperature
## Proccess
## Analysis
## Graph
```{r, echo = FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)


ggplot(mtempm, aes(Year, Mean_Temp, color = Month)) + 
  geom_line(aes(
            group = Month,
            color = Year > 2025)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2026) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#0072B2", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("Observed", "Projected")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks())+
  theme (axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~Month) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(40, 90)) +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature over Years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Temperature",
    color = "Status")

```
# Energy Generation
## Proccess
## Analysis
# Energy Consumption
## Proccess
## Analysis
## Graph
```{r, echo = FALSE}
library(ggplot2)
library(dplyr)
library(scales)
library(lubridate)


ggplot(mtempm, aes(Year, Mean_Temp, color = Month)) + 
  geom_line(aes(
            group = Month,
            color = Year > 2025)) +
  geom_hline(yintercept = 85) +
  geom_vline(xintercept = 2026) +
  scale_color_manual(values = c("FALSE" = "#0072B2", "TRUE" = "#E69F00"),
                     labels = c("Observed", "Projected")) +
  scale_x_continuous(breaks = scales::pretty_breaks())+
  theme (axis.text.x = element_text(angle = 45, hjust = 1, vjust = 1)) +
  facet_wrap(~Month) +
  scale_y_continuous(limits = c(40, 90)) +
  labs(
    title = "Temperature over Years",
    x = "Year",
    y = "Temperature",
    color = "Status")

```
# Future Steps
